title: Elytra Revamped
description: Making Horses and Minecarts relevant again in the Late game
body:
# Reworked everything!

All features:

Disabled Rockets

> Added Grace Periode
> Added Midflight boost (Need to use Rocket with Star/Explosion effect)
> Added config options for Tick periode and Strength


Campfires now boost

> Haybales give an extra boost
> Grids give extra boost
> Works either Linear based on height (Closer = Stronger)
> config options for strength, and height detection


Soul Campfires now pull

> Haybales give an extra pull
> Grids give extra pull
> Works either Linear based on height (Further = Stronger)
> config options for strength, and height detection


Added Drag

> Controllable by using Shift
> Also added Airdrag based on world height (off by default)
> Added Elytra Bounce (Experimental)


Sort of bunny hopping? 

Still kinda broken, might help with hitting the ground to hard. 
Hold space to use.


Visuals and Sounds

> Bare bones versions for Server side. All player will see these.
> Added a more Rich version when using the mod on Both Client and Server (CLIENT IS PURELY OPTIONAL)
> Client Side, Colored Smoke, Based on Firework data


Riptide Nerf

> Nerfed the use of the Riptide Enchantment by adding a Cooldown to it. So you can't spawn it during flight.
> Cooldown instant resets when you land, otherwise 600 Tick cooldown. (Configureble)


YACL Support

> Client side has YACL support for easy configs
> Debug Features in both the Config and in Server Commands. These commands toggle the Config options. (Not protected yet, any player can currently activate debug options). BUT there is an option to toggle this commands off in the Config.

Also, Accessories Compat!

PS. new GitHub page for issues and source code.
